900.full_name: Adam ibn Rabi'a b. al-Harith b. 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab
900.arabic: آدم بن ربيعة بن الحارث بن عبد المطلب
900.bio: First blood of Jahaliyah which was forgiven after Opening of Makkah. There is confusion with name (Tamim, Iyas).

901.full_name: Muhammad ibn Rabi'ah b. al-Harith ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab
901.arabic: محمد بن ربيعة بن الحارث بن عبد المطلب

902.full_name: 'Abdullah ibn  Rabi'ah b. al-Harith ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab
902.arabic: عبد الله بن ربيعة بن الحارث بن عبدالمطلب

903.full_name: 'Abbas ibn Rabi'ah ibn al-Harith ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab
903.arabic: عباس بن ربيعة بن الحارث بن عبدالمطلب

904.full_name: al-Harith ibn Rabi'ah b. al-Harith ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hasim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab
904.arabic: الحارث بن ربيعة بن الحارث بن عبدالمطلب

905.full_name: 'Abd Shams bin Rabi'ah ibn al-Harith ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab
905.arabic: عبد شمس بن ربيعة بن الحارث بن عبدالمطلب

906.full_name: 'Abd al-Muttalib ibn Rabi'ah b. al-Harith b. 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy
906.arabic: عبد المطلب بن ربيعة بن الحارث

907.full_name: Arwa bint Rabi'ah bin al-Harith b. 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab

908.full_name: Hind bint al-Harith b. 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hasim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab

909.full_name: Umima/Umama bint al-Harith b. 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hasim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab
909.arabic: أميمة/ أمامة بنت ربيعة بن الحارث

910.full_name: 'Abdullah bin al-Miqdad ibn 'Amr b. Tha'laba b. Malik b. Rabi'ah b. 'Amir al-Bahrani, al-Kindi
910.arabic: عبد الله بن المقداد بن الأسود

911.full_name: Ma'bad bin al-Miqdad ibn 'Amr b. Tha'laba b. Malik b. Rabi'ah b. 'Amir al-Bahrani, al-Kindi
911.arabic: معبد بن المقداد بن الأسود الكندي

912.full_name: 'Abdullah bin al-Harith bin Nawfal b.al-Harith b. 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy
912.arabic: عبد الله بن الحارث بن نوفل
912.bio: He was from the Banu Hashim.  Moved with his father to Basra and built a house there.  Was appointed governor of Basra for 'Abdullah ibn az-Zubayr until he was dismissed and al-Harith ibn 'Abdullah al-Makhzumi was appointed.

913.short_name: Umm al-Mughira bint Nawfal ibn al-Harith
913.full_name: Umm al-Mughira bint Nawfal ibn al-Harith ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Quasyy
913.arabic: أم المغيرة بنت نوفل بن الحارث

914.full_name: 'Ubaidallah ibn Nawfal ibn al-Harith ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Quasyy b. Kilab
914.arabic: عبيد الله بن نوفل بن الحارث

915.full_name: 'Abdullah bin az-Zubair ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
915.arabic: عبد الله بن الزبير بن عبد المطلب بن هاشم

916.full_name: 'Abdullah bin 'Alqamah bin al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
916.arabic: عبد الله أبو نبقة بن علقمه بن المطلب
916.bio: According to some sources, he was converted on the day of opening of Makkah

917.full_name: Hadeem bin 'Abdullah bin 'Alqamah bin al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
917.arabic: هديم بن عبد الله بن علقمه بن المطلب

918.full_name: Junadah bin 'Abdullah bin 'Alqamah bin al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
918.arabic: جنادة بن عبد الله بن علقمه بن المطلب

919.full_name: Umm Rimtha bint 'Amr b. Hashim bin al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
919.arabic: رميثة / أم رمثة بنت عمرو بن هاشم
919.bio: There are some confusion whether she is from Quraish or Ansar.

920.full_name: 'Awn bin Ubaydah ibn al-Harith b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. kilab b. Murrah
920.arabic: عون بن عبيدة بن الحارث بن المطلب

921.full_name: Khadijah bint Ubaydah ibn al-Harith b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. kilab b. Murrah

922.full_name: Hind bint al-Husayn ibn al-Harith b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah

924.full_name: Makhrama bin al-Qasim bin Makhrama b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
924.arabic: مخرمة بن القاسم بن مخرمة بن المطلب

925.full_name: al-Salt bin Makhrama b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
925.mother_name: bint 'Abdullah bin Saba' bin Malik al-Ghanwi
925.bio: According to some other sources, He became Muslim after the opening of Makkah.

926.full_name: al-Hakam bin al-Salt bin Makhrama b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah

927.arabic: جهيم بن الصلت بن مخرمة بن المطلب
927.bio: According to some other sources, He became Muslim after the opening of Makkah.

928.full_name: Qays bin Makhrama b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
928.mother_name: bint 'Abdullah bin Saba' bin Malik al-Ghanwi
928.students: ابنه عبد الله تقدم حديثه في قباث

929.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Qays bin Makhrama b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah

931.full_name: Zaynab bin Qays bin Makhrama b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
931.arabic: زينب بنت قيس بن مخرمة بن المطلب

932.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Malik b. al-Qashb(Jundab) b. Nadla b. 'Abdullah b. Rafi' .. b. Dahman..b. Nasr b. Azd
932.arabic: عبد الله بن بحينة /مالك بن القشب
932.students: ابنه علي,11420,11197,11442,محمد بن يحيى بن حيان

933.full_name: Jubayr bin Malik b. al-Qashb(Jundab) b. Nadla b. 'Abdullah b. Rafi' .. b. Dahman..b. Nasr b. Azd

934.full_name: 'Abd Yazid bin Hashim bin al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
934.arabic: عبد يزيد بن هاشم بن المطلب

936.mother_name: al-Shifa' bint al-Arqam bin Nadla b. Hashim

937.full_name: al-Saib bin 'Ubiad b. 'Abd Yazid b. Hashim b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah

938.full_name: Shafi' bin al-Saib b. 'Ubiad b. 'Abd Yazid b. Hashim b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. kilab

938.mother_name: Umm al-Shafi',Khalida bint Asad bin Hashim

939.full_name: 'Abdullah bin al-Saib b. 'Ubiad b. 'Abd Yazid b. Hashim b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy
939.arabic: عبد الله بن السائب بن عبيد بن عبد يزيد
939.mother_name: Umm al-Shafi',Khalida bint Asad bin Hashim

940.full_name: Rukanah bin 'Abd Yazid bin Hashim bin al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
940.arabic: ركانة بن عبد يزيد بن هاشم بن المطلب
940.bio: He was a strong man. Before his conversion to Islam, he challenged Prophet(ﷺ) to wrestle with him. Prophet(ﷺ) easily beat him (with the help of Allah) and he accepted Islam.

941.full_name: Yazid bin Rukanah bin 'Abd Yazid b. Hashim b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
941.arabic: يزيد بن ركانة بن عبد يزيد بن هاشم

942.full_name: Talha bin Rukanah bin 'Abd Yazid b. Hashim b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
942.arabic: طلحة بن ركانة بن عبد يزيد بن هاشم

943.full_name: Muhammad bin Rukanah bin 'Abd Yazid b. Hashim b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab
943.arabic: محمد بن ركانة بن عبد يزيد بن هاشم

945.full_name: 'Ujayr bin 'Abd Yazid bin Hashim bin al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah

948.full_name: Sufyan bin Qays bin al-Harith b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. kilab b. Murrah b. Ka'b

949.full_name: 'Ubda bint al-Harith/al-Arrat b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
949.mother_name: Umm Sayfi bint al-Aswad of B.Asad

950.full_name: As-hama bin Abhar, King of Abyssina
950.arabic: أصحمة بن ابحر النجاشي ملك الحبشة
950.bio: He never saw Prophet(ﷺ). Prophet(ﷺ) prayed Salat Janaza in abstention for him.

955.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin Samra bin Habib b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murra
955.mother_name: Arwa bint abi a'-Faria' fo B. Faras

956.full_name: 'Amr bin Samra bin Habib b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murra
956.mother_name: Arwa bint abi a'-Faria' fo B. Faras

957.full_name: Safwan bin 'Amr bin Sameet  of B. Hajr from B. Kabir b. Ghanm b. Dudan b. Asad b. Khuzaym
957.bio: Ally of B. 'Abdu Shams from B. Kabir, a clan of B.Sulam

959.full_name: Sabih Mawla Abi Ahayha Sa'isd bin al-'Aas bin Umayya

960.full_name: Khalid/Shayba ibn 'Utbah b. Rabi'a b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
960.arabic: أبو هاشم بن عتبة بن ربيعة بن عبد شمس
960.bio: Some said that his real name was Misham or Hashim. Brother of Mu'saib bin 'Umair from mother side.

961.arabic: جذامة بنت جندل/جدامة بنت وهب الأسدية

962.full_name: Umm Kulthum bint 'Utba b. Rabi'a b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah

964.full_name: Fatima bint 'Utba b. Rabi'a b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah

966.short_name: Habbar bin Abi al-'As bin Nawfal

966.father_name: Abi al-'As bin Nawfal b. 'Abd Shams
966.bio: His father was Capture/killed in the battle of Badr as disbeliever.

967.full_name: 'Uthman bin Abi al-'As bin Nawfal b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
967.arabic: عثمان بن أبي العاص بن نوفل بن عبد شمس
967.father_name: Abi al-'As bin Nawfal b. 'Abd Shams
967.bio: His father was Capture/killed in the battle of Badr as disbeliever.

968.full_name: Sa'di bint Kuraiz bin Rabi'a b. Habib b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Quassy b. Kilab b. Murrah
968.father_name: Kuraiz bin Rabi'ah b. Habib b. 'Abd Shams

969.full_name: 'Abdullah bin 'Amir bin Kuraiz bin Rabi'a b. Habib b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Quassy b. Kilab
969.arabic: عبد الله بن عامر بن كريز بن ربيعة
969.bio: He was governor of Basrah for 'Uthman bin 'Affan

970.full_name: Fatima bint Shayba bin Rabi'a b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
970.arabic: فاطمة بنت شيبة بن ربيعة بن عبد شمس
970.mother_name: Umm Sharak bint waqdan of B. 'Amir b. Lu'ayy
970.bio: Her father was killed in the battle of Badr as disbeliever. Some other said that Fatima bint 'utba was married to 'Aqeel bin Abi Talib (Allah knows the best).

971.full_name: 'Aisha bint Shayba bin Rabi'a b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
971.arabic: عائشة بنت شيبة بن ربيعة بن عبد شمس

971.bio: Her father was killed in the battle of Badr as disbeliever.

972.full_name: 'Ubaidullah bin Shayba bin Rabi'a b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
972.arabic: عبيد الله بن شيبة بن ربيعة بن عبد شمس
972.bio: His father was killed in the battle of Badr as disbeliever.

974.full_name: Safiyah bint 'Ubiad bin Rabi'a b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah

975.bio: His father was killed in the battle of Badr as disbeliever.

985.mother_name: Hind or Safiyah bint al-Mughira al-Makhzumia

988.arabic: أم حبيب بنت العاص بن أمية بن عبد شمس
988.bio: Her Husband was killed in battle of al-Khandaq as disbeliever.

989.short_name: Sa'id bin al-'As bin Sa'id bin al-'As

989.father_name: al-'As b. Sa'id b. al-'As b. Umayya
989.mother_name: Umm Kulthum bint 'Amr of 'Amir b. Lu'ayy
989.bio: His Father was killed in battle of Badr as disbeliever.

990.short_name: Khalid bin Usayd bin Abi al-'Is
990.full_name: Khalid bin Usayd bin Abi al-'Is b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah

990.father_name: Usayd bin Abi al-'Is b. Umayya
